title: coelogyne carnosulilabra
intro: Coelogyne carnosulilabra, also known as the Coelogyne carnosula or the 'Fleshy-Lipped Coelogyne', is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Coelogyne carnosulilabra include its antioxidant, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress, infections, and chronic diseases. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through decoction or infusion, where the dried roots and rhizomes are steeped in hot water to produce a medicinal tea or tonic.
